untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identifying previous significant swing highs/lows with custom lookback logic (lookback_bars: 30) and detecting failed tests with specific tolerance thresholds (test_tolerance_pct: 1.0, breakout_threshold_pct: 2.0). The allowed indicators do not include a dynamic swing detection or level-identification mechanism. Pivot points used as approximation, but true implementation requires custom swing detection logic not available in standard indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using pivot points (pivot, s1, r1) as proxy for support/resistance levels, but this does not capture the specific 30-bar lookback for swing identification or the nuanced failed-test detection (price touches within 1%, reverses within 2%). The signal is inherently pattern-recognition based and requires bar-by-bar swing analysis unavailable in the standard indicator library.
